tax_filing.title: Annual income declaration
tax_filing.summary: Annual income tax return via Skatteverket; corporate rate 20.6%.

vat_gst.title: Swedish VAT (moms) — monthly/quarterly
vat_gst.summary: Standard 25% / 12% / 6% rates. Monthly or quarterly returns to Skatteverket.

e_invoicing.title: PEPPOL mandatory for B2G since 2019
e_invoicing.summary: All public-sector invoices must be sent as PEPPOL BIS Billing 3.

e_invoicing.title: B2B PEPPOL adoption trending
e_invoicing.summary: Voluntary but rapidly growing B2B PEPPOL adoption; aligns with EU ViDA 2030.

payroll.title: Swedish payroll — employer social fees ~31%
payroll.summary: MEDIUM complexity: employer social fees (arbetsgivaravgifter) ~31%; monthly AGI reporting.

local_gaap.title: Swedish GAAP (BFN K2/K3) or IFRS
local_gaap.summary: K2/K3 frameworks per Bokföringsnämnden; listed entities IFRS.

banking_payments.title: PSD2 + SEPA + Swish + BankID
banking_payments.summary: PSD2 + SEPA. Swish dominant for instant payments; BankID for authentication.
